name: Dark Wolfgang
description: Dark Wolfgang is the Dark counterpart of Wolfgang in Skylanders: Imaginators. He is included in the Dark Edition of Imaginators, along with Dark Golden Queen and Dark King Pen, and a Dark Doom Raider boss in Skylanders: Ring of Heroes.
biography: Dark Wolfgang is the Dark counterpart of Wolfgang in Skylanders: Imaginators. He is included in the Dark Edition of Imaginators, along with Dark Golden Queen and Dark King Pen, and a Dark Doom Raider boss in Skylanders: Ring of Heroes.
personality: As a practitioner of rock and roll, Dark Wolfgang is energetic and rebellious, though he now uses his musical talents to protect Skylands as a reformed Sensei.

story.content: Dark Wolfgang is the Dark counterpart of Wolfgang in Skylanders: Imaginators. He is included in the Dark Edition of Imaginators, along with Dark Golden Queen and Dark King Pen, and a Dark Doom Raider boss in Skylanders: Ring of Heroes.

trivia: Dark Wolfgang is the first Dark Edition Undead figure.
Dark Wolfgang looks like Wolfgang's evolved state from Trap Team, albeit with minor differences.
gameplay: As a Bowslinger Sensei, Dark Wolfgang uses his guitar-like bow to perform musical attacks. His moveset includes Strike a Chord, Knee Slide, Song of the Underworld, Lay Some Tracks, and his powerful Sky Chi move, Surround Sound.

basic.name: Strike a Chord
basic.content: Attack with your guitar bow by striking musical chords.

basic.name: Knee Slide
basic.content: Perform a rock-and-roll knee slide to damage enemies in your path.

basic_upgrades.name: Song of the Underworld
basic_upgrades.content: Play a powerful song that channels the power of the Underworld.

basic_upgrades.name: Lay Some Tracks
basic_upgrades.content: Lay tracks on the ground to control the battlefield.

soulgems.name: Surround Sound
soulgems.content: Release a massive Sky Chi attack that surrounds enemies with devastating sound.
